top_signals.title: Stock Valuations Should Worry Investors: Abby Joseph Cohen
top_signals.summary: Abby Joseph Cohen, professor at Columbia Business School, joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." Lofty stock prices may be hiding risks investors should be paying more attention to, especially in the labor market, according to Abby Joseph Cohen, the former Goldman Sachs partner and now Columbia Business School professor. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Hubble Pushes Satellite Network For Long-Range Bluetooth
top_signals.summary: Alex Haro Co-Founder & CEO at Hubble Network joins Bloomberg Businessweek to the future of Bluetooth and the space economy.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Your First GRC Agent: A Red Teamer's Walkthrough
top_signals.summary: AI won't replace GRC analysts, but it can eliminate much of the repetitive work they do. Anecdotes walks through building an agent that continuously monitors controls, identifies evidence gaps, and opens remediation tasks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
